summary: PR #2495 improved matching in src/melee/lb/lbsnap.c and updated one lbsnap header prototype. The PR body claims the remaining unmatched lbsnap surface was reduced to two functions, with configure+ninja verification and 20/22 functions at 100%. The bot report records five new matched functions and one partial improvement in lbSnap_8001DA5C. The PR was closed with merged_at null in the loaded metadata.

key_files.role: Primary decomp matching changes: helper extraction, control-flow reshaping, typed locals, tiled RGB offset helpers, save-data offset helper, and matching-oriented local/register adjustments.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/lb/lbsnap.c +84/-92, 7 hunks
raw_diff: additions of lbSnap_ClearText, lbSnap_GetTiledRGBOffset, lbSnap_GetTiledYOff, lbSnap_GetSaveDataOffset
text_corpus issue_comment: 5 new matches and lbSnap_8001DA5C improvement

key_files.role: Header prototype cleanup for lbSnap_8001E27C from placeholder UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void(void).
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/lb/lbsnap.h +1/-1, 1 hunk
raw_diff: lbSnap_8001E27C prototype changed to void lbSnap_8001E27C(void)

what_changed: Added static inline lbSnap_ClearText(char* text) and replaced repeated 0x21-byte text clearing loops in lbSnap_8001D5FC, lbSnap_8001D7B0, and lbSnap_8001E058.
Reshaped several card-result functions to store ptr->card_result in a ret local, branch on ret == 0, assign call results into ret, and return once at the end.

Reworked lbSnap_8001DA5C from register-named locals and dense address arithmetic into named locals such as dst, dst_x, src_x, dst_col, tile_column, dst_y, src_y_accum, and pixel, plus tiled-offset inline helpers.
Changed lbSnap_8001DC0C so seconds is u32 and OSSecondsToTicks is called inline with an explicit u64 cast before OSTicksToCalendarTime.
Added lbSnap_GetSaveDataOffset(struct Unk80433380_0* snap) and reused it in lbSnap_8001DF20 and lbSnap_8001DF6C.
In lbSnap_8001DF6C, introduced desc and chan_arg locals, removed a PAD_STACK(8), and accessed lbSnap_803BACC8 through desc for the save descriptor call.
Updated lbSnap_8001E27C declaration in lbsnap.h from placeholder signature to void lbSnap_8001E27C(void).

smart_moves.text: Factored identical fixed-size stack buffer clearing into a local inline helper, reducing repeated generated-looking loops while preserving the explicit 0x21-byte behavior used by several functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_ClearText added and used in lbSnap_8001D5FC, lbSnap_8001D7B0, lbSnap_8001E058

smart_moves.text: Used small local helpers for repeated tiled image offset formulas and save-data offset computation instead of leaving long pointer arithmetic duplicated inline.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_GetTiledRGBOffset, lbSnap_GetTiledYOff, lbSnap_GetSaveDataOffset

smart_moves.text: Kept the partially improved lbSnap_8001DA5C marked as a blocker rather than claiming it matched.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: remaining blockers list lbSnap_8001DA5C at 55.87963%
text_corpus issue_comment: lbSnap_8001DA5C improved from 47.05% to 55.88%

smart_moves.text: Paired a source header prototype cleanup with the recovered signature for lbSnap_8001E27C instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS in the public declaration.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbsnap.h prototype change for lbSnap_8001E27C

decomp_lessons.lesson: When several sibling functions contain identical fixed-size initialization loops for local buffers, a static inline helper can be a cleaner match candidate than preserving copied loop bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: repeated while loops clearing text/text1/text2 were replaced with lbSnap_ClearText

decomp_lessons.lesson: For matching card-result state functions, storing the state in a ret local and using a single final return can be a useful control-flow shape when multiple early returns are near-matches.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ptr->card_result checks changed to ret local and trailing return ret
text_corpus issue_comment: these functions became 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Replacing register-style decompiler locals with role names can make a partially matched function more reviewable, but partial scores should remain explicitly marked as incomplete.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: r4/r5/r6/r7/r9/r10/r25/r27/r28 replaced with dst_x, src_x, dst_col, tile_column, dst_y, src_y_accum, pixel
human_pr_text: lbSnap_8001DA5C remains 55.87963%

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a body proves a non-placeholder function signature, update the owning header prototype as part of the same decomp cleanup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: UNK_RET lbSnap_8001E27C(UNK_PARAMS) changed to void lbSnap_8001E27C(void)

naming_conventions.name: lbSnap_ClearText
naming_conventions.convention: Use lbSnap_ prefix for file-local helpers in lbsnap.c; helper name states the operation on text buffers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline void lbSnap_ClearText(char* text)

naming_conventions.name: lbSnap_GetTiledRGBOffset / lbSnap_GetTiledYOff
naming_conventions.convention: Use lbSnap_ prefix plus GetTiled* names for local image/tile address calculations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline int lbSnap_GetTiledRGBOffset(...), lbSnap_GetTiledYOff(...)

naming_conventions.name: dst_x, src_x, dst_col, tile_column, dst_y, src_y_accum, pixel
naming_conventions.convention: Replace register-number locals with short role names when the dataflow role is visible from the arithmetic and stores.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DA5C local variable rewrite

naming_conventions.name: desc
naming_conventions.convention: Use a short role name for a descriptor pointer when replacing repeated global struct accesses.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct Unk803BACC8* desc = &lbSnap_803BACC8 in lbSnap_8001DF6C

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was retained in some functions and adjusted in others while reshaping locals and control flow.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK(8) retained in lbSnap_8001D5FC, lbSnap_8001D7B0, lbSnap_8001E058; lbSnap_8001DA5C changed from PAD_STACK(16) to PAD_STACK(8); lbSnap_8001DF6C PAD_STACK(8) removed
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: PAD_STACK is a matching tactic and should remain justified by local objdiff/build evidence; the PR body and bot report provide matching evidence for several functions but not a per-line rationale for each PAD_STACK adjustment.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced temporary locals such as ret, snap, desc, and chan_arg to influence control flow, register allocation, or repeated access shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ret locals in card-result functions; snap in lbSnap_8001DF20; desc and chan_arg in lbSnap_8001DF6C
human_pr_text: lbSnap_8001DF20 remains 98.15790% with register allocation only
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR identifies register allocation as the remaining lbSnap_8001DF20 issue, but does not explicitly state which locals were introduced for register allocation.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used explicit integer width/cast in time conversion: seconds became u32 and OSSecondsToTicks receives (u64) seconds inline.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DC0C OSTime seconds changed to u32 seconds and OSTicksToCalendarTime(OSSecondsToTicks((u64) seconds), &time)
text_corpus issue_comment: lbSnap_8001DC0C reached 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This is supported as a local matching tactic for this function only; no broader time API convention is proven by the PR slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Repeated fixed-size buffer clears can become local inline helpers
accepted_candidate_records.text: In lbsnap, several near-matched functions cleared 0x21-byte text buffers with copied loops. PR #2495 replaced those loops with static inline lbSnap_ClearText and the bot report showed lbSnap_8001D5FC, lbSnap_8001D7B0, and lbSnap_8001E058 reaching 100%. Candidate lesson: when sibling functions share identical fixed-size initialization loops, test a narrow file-local inline helper instead of preserving duplicated generated-looking loops.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_ClearText helper and replacements
text_corpus issue_comment: affected functions reached 100.00%

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header placeholder signatures should be removed when the recovered signature is known
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2495 changed lbSnap_8001E27C in src/melee/lb/lbsnap.h from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void(void), matching the truthful-header principle for recovered function bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbSnap_8001E27C prototype update
